01 · Company

ElectriQ Introduction

Powering India’s gig workforce with affordable, tech-enabled electric mobility — through a fully structured lease-to-own model.

Only Electriq Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a Hyderabad-based EV company that manufactures, deploys, and manages low-speed electric scooters for India’s last-mile delivery and gig economy workforce.

Our business model is built on a Sale-Leaseback framework — investors acquire vehicles and lease them back to Electriq, which deploys them to verified riders under a structured Finance or Operational Lease. Investors receive fixed monthly EMI repayments, earning a predictable 8% Annual IRR over the tenure.

Every vehicle is IoT-enabled with real-time GPS tracking, a dedicated Rider App, and a Partner Dashboard — giving full visibility throughout the lease lifecycle.

🎯 Mission: Democratise EV ownership for India’s 50M+ gig workers — combining affordability, inclusion, and a clean path to asset ownership.
🏭
In-House Manufacturing
Vehicles designed and built by Electriq — full quality control
📱
Full Digital Ecosystem
Rider App, Partner APK, DigiLocker KYC, IoT telematics — all included
🔋
Battery Swapping Infrastructure
Swapping stations installed by Electriq — zero downtime for riders
📈
Target: 3,000 Fleet by FY27
Rapidly scaling partner-led fleet network across urban India
🛡
Asset-Backed Security
Investment backed by tangible vehicle assets with insurance coverage
